docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY INTRIERI, STEPANIE AS TO DEFENDANT HELFRICH, ARLENE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-10-1998 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
